label: CIS Safeguard 4.5
title: Implement and Manage a Firewall on End-User Devices

prose.en: Implement and manage a host-based firewall or port-filtering tool on end-user devices, with a default-deny rule that drops all traffic except those services and ports that are explicitly allowed.
A host-based firewall or port-filtering tool is implemented and managed on end-user devices.
A default-deny rule is in place that drops all traffic except those services and ports that are explicitly allowed.
